steps.title: Translate the increase
steps.content:
A value that is $130\%$ greater than $g$ is the original $g$ plus $130\%$ of $g$. That makes $f$ equal to $230\%$ of $g$.
$$f=2.30g$$

steps.title: Apply the decrease
steps.content:
If $h$ is $80\%$ less than $f$, then $h$ is $20\%$ of $f$. Substitute the expression for $f$.
$$h=0.20f$$
$$h=0.20(2.30g)$$
$$h=0.46g$$

steps.title: Read the multiplier
steps.content: The equation shows that $h$ is $0.46$ times $g$. The answer is B.
